app.title: AI Book Batch Writer
app.tagline: Outline-first long-form drafting across cloud and local AI models

home.title: What would you like to do?
home.subtitle: Choose an area to start or continue your work.
home.navigation_hint: Create, manage and export long-form AI writing projects.
home.create_description: Start a guided book project, generate its outline and write it chapter by chapter.
home.maintenance_description: Load an existing project, review its progress and continue working on it.
home.settings_description: Choose the default AI provider and model used by new book projects.
home.utilities_description: Export the current project or open the project and export folders.

wizard.override_hint: Global model settings are preloaded. Changes here apply only to this book.
wizard.book_locked_hint: The outline is locked after book generation starts.

maintenance.title: Book Maintenance
maintenance.description: Open a saved JSON project and continue from its current stage.
maintenance.no_project_detail: Load a project to see its chapters, progress and token usage.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.description: These defaults are preloaded whenever you create a new book.
settings.not_configured: Global model settings have not been saved yet
settings.security_note: API keys entered here are kept only for the current session. They are never written to settings or project files.

utilities.title: Other Utilities
utilities.description: Quick access to project exports and working folders.

placeholder.api_key: Enter the API key for this session
placeholder.main_idea: Describe the subject, purpose and desired scope of the book.
placeholder.additional_instructions: Optional style, structure, factual or formatting guidance.
placeholder.outline: Generate or load an outline, then review and edit its JSON here.
placeholder.preview: Generated chapters and sections will appear here.

status.cancelling: Cancelling after the current model request...

log.outline_completed: Outline generated with {chapters} chapters ({tokens} tokens; {total_tokens} total).
log.section_completed: Completed section "{section}" ({words} words, about {tokens} tokens; {total_tokens} total).
log.chapter_completed: Completed chapter {number} ({words} words, about {tokens} tokens; {total_tokens} total).
log.book_completed_with_errors: Book generation finished with {failed} failed chapter(s). Total tokens: {total_tokens}.

dialog.confirm_close: Generation is still running. Cancel it and close the application?
dialog.new_project_confirm: The current in-memory project will be replaced. Continue?

message.global_settings_missing: No global model settings have been saved yet. You can continue with the displayed defaults or configure them from Global Settings.
message.global_settings_saved: Global model settings were saved. New book projects will preload them.
message.outline_locked: The outline cannot be regenerated after book generation has started.

error.missing_api_key: An API key is required for {provider}. Enter one for this session or set {env_var} in .env.
error.invalid_outline:
The outline JSON is missing or invalid.

{error}
error.save_failed:
The project could not be saved.

{error}
error.load_failed:
The project could not be loaded.

{error}
error.export_failed:
The export could not be completed.

{error}
error.no_project: Generate or load an outline before using this action.
error.no_chapters: The project does not contain any chapters.
error.busy: Please wait for the current operation to finish.
error.model_refresh_failed:
The model catalog could not be updated.

{error}
error.no_models_returned: The provider did not return any compatible models.
error.open_folder_failed:
The folder could not be opened.

{error}
error.open_folder_unsupported: Opening folders is not supported on this platform.
